sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: terrible as a casual everyday drink because outside hard training, the sugar is hard to justify. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.

closing.summary: Sports Drink does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
